flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Los Angeles rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.0k → $49.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Los Angeles rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.3k → $15.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Los Angeles rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Los Angeles fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
